brd: Knowledge Retrieval During Intake (similar jobs, guidance, standards, limitations, history)

brd: Customer Communication (acknowledgements, clarifications, updates); every message traceable

brd: Line strengthening, Gap filling, Line continuity improvement

#S04-01_IHIVE_ARCH_DOC.title: I-HIVE Architecture Documentation
brd: Raster-to-SVG vector image file architecture exists and is documented (I-HIVE verification)

#S04-05_MULTIPASS_LAYER_TRACE.title: Multi-Pass / Layer-Specific Tracing
brd: Vector Generation > Multi-pass tracing, Layer-specific tracing

#S04-06_PARAM_EXPLORATION_RECORD.title: Parameter→Candidate Records
brd: Every parameter set shall generate a measurable candidate.

#S04-08_BAYESIAN_PATHSCORE.title: Bayesian Path-Quality Scoring

#S04-10_SANDBOX_ISOLATION_VERIFY.title: Sandbox Isolation Verification
brd: Prevent production artifacts from being overwritten

#S05-03_SVG_TOPOLOGY_QA.title: SVG Topology QA
brd: SVG topology optimization, SVG Topology QA (agent responsibility)

#S05-06_PRODUCTION_SVG_SELECT.title: Canonical Production SVG Selection
brd: The highest-ranked candidate shall become the default production candidate while preserving all alternatives.
Canonical production SVG files are generated

#S05-08_VISUAL_FIDELITY_ATTESTATION_SVG.title: MANDATORY Visual-Fidelity Attestation (SVG vs source)
brd: CRITICAL: agent MUST verbally confirm the SVG preserves silhouette/proportions/intent/scale vs the customer source image BEFORE positing a finished vectorized SVG (visual-fidelity mandate)

#S06-01_VISUAL_FIDELITY_ATTESTATION_PRES.title: MANDATORY Visual-Fidelity Attestation (pre-stitch)
brd: CRITICAL: agent MUST verbally confirm fidelity vs the customer source image BEFORE creating embroidery stitch plans from the SVG (visual-fidelity mandate)

#S06-09_SATIN_GENERATION.title: Satin Column Generation
brd: Satin generation, Satin column planning, Rail direction validation

#S06-10_FILL_GENERATION.title: Fill Generation
brd: Fill generation, Stitch strategies > Tatami/Motif/Decorative fill

#S06-11_RUNNING_STITCH_GENERATION.title: Running/Bean Stitch Generation
brd: Running stitch generation, Triple running, Bean stitch

#S06-14_COLOR_SEQUENCING.title: Color Block Sequencing
brd: Color block optimization, Color sequencing, Color ordering

#S06-15_STITCH_PLAN_ARTIFACT.title: Canonical Stitch Plan Artifact
brd: Production Artifacts > Stitch plan; canonical artifacts consumed downstream

#S07-01_INKSTITCH_PATH_CONFIRM.title: Confirm Inkscape Extension Path
brd: Ink/Stitch Validation > Confirm Inkscape extension path

#S07-04_TEST_SVG_GENERATE.title: Generate Test SVG (NOT customer artwork)
brd: The initial validation shall never use customer artwork; only simple test artwork until export verified.

#S07-05_TEST_EXPORT_EMBROIDERY.title: Export Test Embroidery File (gate)
brd: Ink/Stitch Validation > Generate SVG, Export test embroidery file, Confirm output exists, Validate export

#S07-08_DENSITY_MAP_QA.title: Density Map QA
brd: Embroidery stitch plan density-map quality assurance

#S07-10_BERNINA_B700_COMPLIANCE.title: Bernina B700 Standards Compliance
brd: Bernina B700 stitch plan standards compliance, Bernina B700 compatibility is validated

#S07-11_BERNINA_B700_PROTOCOL_QA.title: Bernina B700 Production Protocol QA
brd: Bernina B700 production protocol quality assurance

#S07-12_QA_APPROVAL_GATE.title: QA Approval Gate
brd: Only plans satisfying QA requirements shall advance to export.

#S08-01_EXPORT_PES.title: PES Export
brd: PES embroidery file export, Production Export > PES

#S08-04_HEADLESS_OUTPUT.title: Headless Production Output
brd: Phase 3 — Headless Production Output (GUIs not required); inkscape --actions example

#S08-05_DIMENSION_PRESERVATION_VERIFY.title: Dimension & Integrity Preservation
brd: Preserving Artwork proportions/Geometric precision/Production dimensions/Structural integrity

#S08-07_EXPORT_METADATA.title: Export Production Metadata
brd: Every export shall preserve Artwork dimensions/Stitch integrity/Color sequence/Production metadata

#S08-08_VISUAL_FIDELITY_ATTESTATION_EXPO.title: MANDATORY Visual-Fidelity Attestation (SVG + PES vs source)
brd: CRITICAL: agent MUST verbally confirm 'I HAVE REVIEWED xxxx.svg and xxxy.pes ... preserve consistent silhouette, proportions, recognizable artistic intent, and relative scale with the customer source image' BEFORE finalizing embroidery output (visual-fidelity mandate)

#S08-09_EXPORT_ARTIFACTS_REGISTER.title: Register Export Artifacts
brd: Production Artifacts > Export files; All production artifacts shall remain reproducible

#S09-03_INVALID_TRANSITION_REJECT.title: Reject Invalid Transitions
brd: Invalid state transitions shall be rejected.
Job status API validates state transitions

brd: Every transition shall be recorded in the project audit history.

#S14-01_EMBEDDED_QA_CHECKPOINTS.title: Embedded QA Checkpoints
brd: Continuous Quality Assurance Philosophy (embedded QA at every checkpoint)
QA exists throughout the production pipeline

#S14-02_DECISION_TRACE_PRESERVE.title: Preserve Decision Traces
brd: Decision traces are preserved; Verification Philosophy

brd: Historical Learning (permanent subsystem); Continuous historical learning

brd: Knowledge Memorialization; Validated improvements shall become permanent engineering knowledge

brd: Self-Improvement Objectives; Improvements shall be validated before becoming permanent behavior

#S15-01_PRODUCTION_READINESS_GATE.title: Production Readiness Gate
brd: Production Readiness (deterministic/observable/verified/traceable/recoverable/validated/repeatable/documented); No subsystem promoted on one success

#S15-07_DR_PROCEDURES.title: Disaster Recovery Procedures (readiness)
brd: Disaster recovery procedures are documented; Recoverability

#S15-09_GIT_CICD.title: Git-Based CI/CD
brd: Git-based continuous integration and continuous deployment; Large Heredoc Command Risk mitigation; py_compile before restart

#S15-10_DEPLOY_TO_RUNTIME.title: Deploy to VPS Runtime Root
brd: Runtime requirement: the system must live and run on the VPS at /root/projects/embiz; Repeatable/automated deployment

#S15-11_GLOBAL_PRINCIPLES_AUDIT.title: Global Engineering Principles Audit
brd: Global Engineering Principles (full list); No subsystem complete until implementation+verification+docs+observability+learning+improvement satisfied
